channel.title: markdown on Sandra Tang
channel.description: Recent content in markdown on Sandra Tang

item.title: Red & Black Newspaper Website
item.description:
LINK TO WEBSITE: https://whsnewspaper.azurewebsites.net/about.html

Our school’s newspaper, The Red & Black, has over 20 articles a month written by various students. I am the website manager, using SQL and Javascript to put all the articles on a database which is then displayed on the website. I do this monthly, and enjoy the process.

item.title: Google Colabs
item.description: I lead our school’s AI Club. Our weekly meetings consist of various things, one of them being Google Colab lectures teaching Introductory Machine Learning topics. Here are a few that I have created. Open in Google Colab
